palette_hint: near-black background (#111114) with off-white text (#edeae3), electric amber accent (#f5a623) and muted steel-blue secondary (#4a7fa5)
type_style: Georgia or serif for display headings (bold, wide tracking), system sans-serif (Arial/Helvetica) for body and UI labels, clean and editorial
description: Ironveil is a fictional boutique brand-strategy and visual identity agency specializing in challenger brands, presenting its work, capabilities, and team across five densely-laid-out pages.
constraints: persistent top navigation bar (~60px tall) with agency name flush-left and 5 nav links flush-right, sticky at top on all pages
all pages use a fixed left sidebar (~220px wide) listing current-page section anchors; main content scrolls independently beside it
work and services pages use a two-column content grid (sidebar + 2-col card grid) with cards showing a colored placeholder rectangle, project name, client tag, and year
process page uses a three-column layout: fixed left sidebar, wide main timeline column, and a narrow right column (~180px) with a sticky summary box
color-coded discipline tags (amber for brand, steel-blue for digital, gray for print) appear consistently on cards and service rows across pages

page_specs.work: Fixed left sidebar lists project-category filter links (All, Brand Identity, Digital, Print, Packaging). Main area shows a 2-column CSS grid of 8 project cards; each card has a tall colored placeholder block, project title, client name in small caps, discipline tag, and year. A dense stats bar above the grid shows three figures: '47 Projects', '19 Industries', '11 Years'.
page_specs.services: Fixed left sidebar lists service anchors (Strategy, Identity, Digital, Campaigns, Print). Main content is a single-column list of 5 service sections; each section has a large serif heading, a two-column description-and-details block (left: 3-sentence description, right: bullet list of deliverables and a starting price), and a horizontal rule separator.
page_specs.studio: Fixed left sidebar links to anchors: Manifesto, Team, Clients, Awards. Main area opens with a 3-paragraph manifesto in large serif type, followed by a 3-column team grid (6 members, each with a solid-color avatar placeholder, name, and title), then a dense 4-column client logo placeholder grid, and finally a two-column awards table with year and recognition columns.
page_specs.process: Three-column layout: fixed left sidebar with phase anchors, wide center column showing a vertical 5-phase timeline (Discovery, Strategy, Concept, Refine, Launch) each with a phase number, heading, 2-sentence description, and a nested deliverables list, and a narrow sticky right column showing a 'Typical Timeline' summary box listing phase durations in a small table.
page_specs.contact: Fixed left sidebar with anchors for New Project, Careers, Press. Main area is split into two columns: left column holds a detailed project-inquiry form (fields for Name, Company, Email, Budget range as a select, Project Type checkboxes, and a textarea for brief), right column holds agency address block, three named contact emails in a small table, a map placeholder rectangle labeled 'Brooklyn, NY 11201', and office hours.
